flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Los Angeles City College rose 18% between 2007 and 2010 ($590 → $699).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Los Angeles City College rose 17% between 2021 and 2024 ($9.0k → $10.6k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Los Angeles City College fell 17% between 2007 and 2010 (18.6% → 15.4%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Los Angeles City College rose 147% between 2007 and 2010 (7.0k → 17.3k).
